Interface AsyncApiMessageBindings

All Superinterfaces:
Node, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
AsyncApi20MessageBindings, AsyncApi21MessageBindings, AsyncApi22MessageBindings, AsyncApi23MessageBindings, AsyncApi24MessageBindings, AsyncApi25MessageBindings, AsyncApi26MessageBindings, AsyncApi2xMessageBindings, AsyncApi30MessageBindings, AsyncApi31MessageBindings, AsyncApi3xMessageBindings
All Known Implementing Classes:
AsyncApi20MessageBindingsImpl, AsyncApi21MessageBindingsImpl, AsyncApi22MessageBindingsImpl, AsyncApi23MessageBindingsImpl, AsyncApi24MessageBindingsImpl, AsyncApi25MessageBindingsImpl, AsyncApi26MessageBindingsImpl, AsyncApi30MessageBindingsImpl, AsyncApi31MessageBindingsImpl
public interface AsyncApiMessageBindings extends Node
